sections.title: Introduction
sections.description: Overview of what this blog post covers.

items.label: Getting Started
items.text: Your introductory text goes here. You can use multiple paragraphs by adding more text items.

items.label: Run this command
items.code:
user@hostname:~$ your-command-here
Expected output line 1
Expected output line 2

items.label: Another example
items.code:
user@hostname:~$ sudo apt-get update
Hit:1 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu jammy InRelease
Reading package lists... Done

items.label: Configuration File
items.code:
user@hostname:~$ sudo nano /etc/config/file.conf

# Edit the file with your settings

items.label: Apply Changes
items.code:
user@hostname:~$ sudo systemctl restart service
user@hostname:~$ sudo systemctl status service
Service is running

items.label: Key Concept
items.text: Here you can write long-form content explaining concepts, best practices, and important information. The text will automatically wrap and format properly.
